sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 166 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2358/2025 2. For orders on CMA No.1007/2025 3. For orders on office objection No.1 4. For orders on CMA No.1007/2025 5. For orders on CMA No.1009/2025 6. For hearing of main case 04.11.2025 1. Granted. 2-6. Prima facie this is a time-barred reference application. On two previous occasions urgent application has been moved, however, applicant remained unrepresented without intimation or justification. Same is the case today. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
